meanings.definition: (often followed by `for') in exchange or in reciprocation
examples: gave up our seats on the plane and in return received several hundred dollars and seats on the next plane out
we get many benefits in return for our taxes

meanings.definition: in a mutual or shared manner
examples: the goals of the negotiators were not reciprocally exclusive

meanings.definition: in an inverse or contrary manner; ; - F.A.Geldard
examples: wavelength and frequency are, of course, related reciprocally
